name: pavitas-content
description: Weekly social content generation for Pavitas Productions. Pulls the Littlebird Pavitas digest, Perplexity industry brief, and Audiobook Projects status from Notion, picks the strongest angles for the week, and drafts two pieces of content (1 image/carousel for IG+FB, 1 short-form video script for TikTok+YT Shorts). Posts drafts directly to the Pavitas Content database. Visual brief only — no Canva generation (intended for future Claude design package integration).
